sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10579" key="a)ntitara/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιτᾰράττω</orth>, <sense id="n10579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stir up in opposition,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:14:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
